summary: Excellent UltraMatrix recording that captures the arena vibe, with a standout opening to Help on the Way
review: The reviewer praises this UltraMatrix source as an "excellent version" that feels like being right in the arena, especially noting how the opening of Help on the Way conveys the live atmosphere. No technical flaws are mentioned, suggesting a very clear and immersive mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review; strong praise for both performance feel and recording quality, but limited data to assess consistency.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer highlights vivid arena feel with no reported issues; implies clear, well‑balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening to Help on the Way is specifically praised for its immersive quality, suggesting a strong start and good overall pacing.
